text.title: FinOps for AI / ML Workloads Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Training crashes at hour 7; re-run costs more than on-demand would have.
antipattern.root-cause: Spot enabled blindly without checkpoint plan.
antipattern.fix: Gate spot on checkpoint capability; fall back to on-demand when checkpointing not implemented.

antipattern.symptom: Same embedding computed 40x/hour; bill doubles unnecessarily.
antipattern.root-cause: No cache layer in front of embedding endpoint.
antipattern.fix: Add a deterministic-key cache with TTL bound to model version.

antipattern.symptom: Model deployed in fp32 without int8 evaluation; cost 2x baseline.
antipattern.root-cause: Quantization skipped for speed of delivery.
antipattern.fix: Force a quantization eval as part of the deployment checklist.

antipattern.symptom: Finance can't attribute $20k/month inference to a team.
antipattern.fix: Mandate per-request tags via gateway middleware.
